title: minuartia glomerata subsp. trichocalycina
intro: Minuartia glomerata subsp. trichocalycina, also known as the Alpine rock-cress or Alpine rock cress, is a plant species within the genus Minuartia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Minuartia glomerata subsp. trichocalycina include the ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
